title: S3 general purpose buckets should have block public access settings enabled
description: This control checks whether the preceding Amazon S3 block public access settings are configured at the account level for an S3 general purpose bucket. The control fails if one or more of the block public access settings are set to false.
what_is_wrong: This control checks whether the preceding Amazon S3 block public access settings are configured at the account level for an S3 general purpose bucket. The control fails if one or more of the block public access settings are set to false.
what_the_fix_does: Enables account-level S3 Block Public Access to stop broad public exposure.

findings.title: S3 general purpose buckets should have block public access settings enabled

recommendation.rationale: Matrix cell risk_medium__criticality_high maps to default recommendation 'pr_only'. Risk is medium and business criticality is high. Criticality evidence: data_sensitivity=0.75, privilege_level=1.00, internet_exposure=0.75, matched_signals=none. Relationship context is incomplete, so the recommendation remains conservative and advisory unless policy overrides it.

execution_guidance.label: Enable account-level S3 Block Public Access (direct fix)
execution_guidance.blast_radius_summary: Affects account-wide security posture for account 696505809372.

pre_checks.message: Confirm this change is intended for AWS::::Account:696505809372 in account 696505809372 (us-east-1).
Direct fix mutates AWS state immediately after approval. Confirm change window and rollback owner before execution.
WriteRole is required for direct-fix execution.
No specialized dependency checks are available for this strategy yet.

execution_guidance.expected_outcome: Direct fix applies the change in AWS immediately: All four account-level public access block settings will be enabled. Security Hub should reflect the remediated state within 12-24 hours.

post_checks.message: Confirm the remediation run completed successfully and capture the run logs or audit artifacts for change evidence.
Verify the completed change only affected the intended account scope for AWS::::Account:696505809372.
Trigger immediate re-evaluation after the change lands and confirm the action closes without reopening.

rollback.summary: Use this rollback command to revert the live AWS change if verification fails or the blast radius is broader than expected.
notes: Capture the current state before approval when your operating policy requires a backout snapshot.
